title: Enhanced Swords
description: A mod that allows you to upgrade your swords
body:
This mod adds 3 tiers of swords. You can get the stones to upgrade your swords from mining stone! This is my first mod so please tell me what to change or improve!

Items it adds:

-Tier 1,2 and 3 upgrade stones
-Tier 1,2 and 3 of every sword in the game


Functionality:

The tier stones can upgrade your swords speed and attack damage.

      Example:

      Wooden sword = 4 damage 1.6 speed

      Tier 1 wooden sword = 5 damage 1.8 speed
